title: Avali Nest VR Modpack Client
description: Private server modpack for Avali Nest with focus on Vivecraft, Create and optimization.
body:
Avali Nest VR Modpack for Avali Nest Discord community.

An collection of mods that all members of Avali Nest suggested, put together into a neat modpack for all to enjoy.

Focus around the modpack is Vivecraft, Create and optimization along with other community selected mods.

Make sure to allocate between 8-12GB ram for the modpack to load.

Credits:
Aquaculture 2: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
